headline: Popular coffee chain closing all locations after surprise sale
summary: Consumers tend to have a favorite when it comes to their choice of coffee shop, but loyalty is not absolute. "More than 50% of Starbucks’ customers often purchase at its competitors, including Dunkin and McDonald’s, who are also known as ‘roamers’. Dunkin and McDonald’s were also found to maintain ...

headline: How The McDonald's (MCD) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Value Initiatives
summary: The analyst fair value estimate for McDonald's has been nudged higher from US$341.28 to US$344.09, signaling a modest recalibration of what the shares might be worth in the models. That shift sits alongside Street commentary that is generally constructive on the brand and its execution, even as some firms flag pockets of caution around valuation and sector level risks. As you read on, you will see how these updated targets and mixed signals fit together, and how you can keep track of the...
